summary: Backend + frontend regression validation of LOT 2 refactoring (server.py split into routes_core_auth/users/admin/notifications/orgs.py + shared core_deps.py; SuperAdminPage.jsx decomposed into /components/superadmin/*). 22/22 backend pytest cases PASS on the external preview URL. Frontend smoke: admin login -> /superadmin renders KPIs and all 5 tabs (Dashboard/Statistiques/Catalogue/Utilisateurs/Commandes) are clickable; buyer login -> /wallet renders with wallet-page + buy-credits-btn data-testids and 250 credits. No regression detected.

integration_issues.issue: Console 'WebSocket error: Event' observed on /superadmin — pre-existing (iteration_11), not a regression. user_id empty in query string.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now 435 lines and only contains app bootstrap + include_router calls — clean.

Some routers are included WITHOUT explicit prefix='/api' (they rely on internal APIRouter(prefix='/api/...')). The 5 new core_* routers were verified to expose all expected /api/* paths (auth/users/admin/notifications/orgs) — 22 endpoints tested return 200.
core_deps.py centralization of get_current_user / check_admin / create_notification via db.get_database() works correctly across all extracted routers — no auth or db-context regression.
Consider adding a lightweight route-inventory test that snapshots app.routes so future refactors don't silently drop endpoints.
seed_data_creation: test_register_and_login creates TEST_lot2_<uuid>@example.com users on each run — safe to leave (prefixed TEST_); test_create_quote_public creates a TEST_ quote request per run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LOT 2 backend refactor is regression-safe. Use test_lot2_refactor_regression.py as smoke suite. Admin login page is /admin/connexion, button label 'Accès sécurisé'. Buyer login page is /connexion, button label 'Se connecter'. /subscriptions returns {plans: [...]} (dict, not list). /auth/register requires: email, password, contact_name, phone, company_name, siret. WebSocket 400 on /api/ws/notifications is a known pre-existing issue — do not flag as regression.
